title: OpenBioScience Marker JSONL Record
description: Schema for one record line in resources/bio/markers/*.jsonl. Each record is marker or atlas evidence for MCP and skill discovery; source and package provenance are carried by the sibling meta, sources, aliases, and index files.

id.description: Stable record identifier inside the package.

species.description: Scientific species name, for example Homo sapiens or Mus musculus.

context.description: Tissue, disease, atlas, or workflow context for this evidence record.

compartment.description: Top-level compartment in the hierarchy compartment -> major_type -> subtype -> state.

major_type.description: Major cell type or lineage label.

subtype.description: Subtype label. Use an empty string when the record is intentionally major-level only.

state.description: Cell state, program, activation, or disease-state evidence. Use null when not applicable.

annotation_level.description: Specificity level represented by the record.

ontology_id.description: Cell Ontology or other stable ontology identifier where available; use an empty string if unresolved.

source_paper.description: Source references, normally DOI, PMID, database, atlas, or package-local source IDs.

core.description: Primary positive marker genes for this identity or evidence record.

supporting.description: Additional positive marker genes that support the interpretation.

negative.description: Genes expected to be absent or low in this identity, used for ambiguity checks.

state.description: State or program genes. These should not replace core identity markers.

notes.description: Short curation note, limitation, or ambiguity warning.
